category_sources: Official CERT NetSA YAF page https://tools.netsa.cert.org/yaf2/ says YAF processes pcap/live captures into bidirectional IPFIX flows.
source_facts.description: Yet another flowmeter: processes packet data from pcap(3).
display_name_sources: Official CERT NetSA page https://tools.netsa.cert.org/yaf2/ titles the project YAF.
docs_sources: Official CERT NetSA YAF page exposes a Documentation section at https://tools.netsa.cert.org/yaf2/.
repo_sources: Official source archive is provided by source_facts.source-archive: https://tools.netsa.cert.org/releases/yaf-2.19.2.tar.gz.
Search found only an unofficial GitHub mirror, so no official source-control repository URL was returned.
tags_sources: Official CERT NetSA documentation describes YAF as exporting bidirectional flow data to IPFIX collectors.
source_facts.description says YAF processes packet data from pcap(3).
